title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・目覚めし好敵手

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright wins the spring Tenno Sho, placing
herself firmly among the greatest members of the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober, inspired by Mejiro Bright's victory,
decides to run in the Takarazuka Kinen, both for
herself and for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright witnesses both Silence Suzuka's
rapid improvement and Mejiro Dober's
determination, and expresses her wish to race
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal might be the autumn Tenno Sho,
but we decide to also run in the Takarazuka Kinen
as an important litmus test for what's to come.
